internal memo — compliance and disclosure preparation for An Phu Enertech JSC (HOSE)
this note consolidates public-source items (press release 15/03/2025; annual report FY2024 on hose.vn) and benign admin details
per Securities Law and SSC guidance, we will treat non-public issuer/securities info with price impact as MNPI; per Decree 13, personal data includes information associated with a person
investor relations draft: Q2 operating update prepared for media kit; embargo until 08/07/2026 09:00 ICT pending board chair sign-off
note: all financial figures in the draft mirror what we already filed in 2025 audited statements; no new projections disclosed
transaction file checklist (public/stale references): term sheet v0.9 referencing historic MOU (announced 12/2024), research notes citing public charts, and website faq links
spa-day and wellness vouchers for employee week are budgeted under staff welfare; unrelated to any capital markets plan
negated MAC language: current share purchase agreement draft includes a standard MAC clause, and counsel confirms no MAC/MAE has occurred or is expected as of today
banking admin (benign): payroll file template requires only employee code (E-000-XX), department, and bank short name; do not collect national ID or full account numbers; sample account: 0000-1234-XYZ at Saigon Frontier Bank
for supplier KYC with Lotus Ridge Holdings Co., please use the standard form: legal entity name, registration place, and public helpline email vendor@lotusridge.example.vn (no personal email)
all external queries should go to ir@anphuenertech.example.vn and ssc helpdesk at help@ssc.example.vn (public)
public identifiers: draft includes placeholder securities code APEN0000 (invalid) for mockup only; actual ticker is already public on the exchange website
board packet attachments are marked working copy only; no confidential codenames used; project nickname in tasks: ops-update july
data minimization: remove birth dates, home addresses, and any HR complaints; only aggregate headcount by site (already disclosed in the 2025 annual report)
disclosure controls: if an agreement is executed, release will follow Circular 96 timelines; until then, avoid forwarding drafts beyond the deal team list
reminder: do not treat publicly available share price graphs, past dividends, or the spa-day schedule as MNPI; avoid over-classification that slows approvals
tracking: use the checklist in jira task dp-pii-014 (internal tag only) to confirm redactions before posting on the hose.vn newsroom
